prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! I know the task ahead of you is challenging and you've been putting it off, but now is the time to dig deep and get it done. Remember, you are capable and strong. Break the task down into smaller steps if needed and just focus on one thing at a time. Take a deep breath, visualize yourself successfully completing the task, and then dive in. You'll feel so much better once it's off your plate. I believe in you and I know you can do this. Go get it!
